tools

Things I reach for regularly, in the terminal and in the field.

terminal

  • mise — runtime version management
  • zsh + starship — shell + prompt
  • neovim — editor

ruby / rails

  • ruby-lsp — language server
  • rubocop — linting and style
  • pry — REPL
  • kamal — deploy

field

  • More coming.
